name: Expro Group Holdings N.V.
description: Expro Group Holdings N.V. is a leading full-cycle energy services provider that delivers innovative, data-driven solutions across the entire well lifecycle. The company specializes in well construction, well flow management, subsea well access, and well intervention and integrity services. With a global presence spanning over 60 countries and a workforce of more than 7,000 employees, Expro focuses on increasing production efficiency and safety while reducing operational costs and emissions. The company supports energy operators in both onshore and offshore environments, providing essential expertise for exploration, development, production, and decommissioning projects worldwide.
